frames.name: panel-09-hook-formation-gpt-retry
frames.prompt: Create a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn director storyboard panel for LUMINA's Switchlight hook. Use Rae, Jia, and Nari as identity anchors. First full stage reveal: Rae center, Jia and Nari as sharp side anchors, Sena and Yumi suggested as softer framing figures. Original light-switch hand gesture near shoulder height. Chrome stage, pearl light panels, reflective black floor. Add colored production notes like a storyboard: red body arrows for the gesture, blue camera push note, orange lights brighten note, green diagonal formation note, purple title hook note. Pencil-and-marker director board style, not a photoreal final frame. No real celebrity likeness, no copied choreography, no logos, no product props.
